further_reading.title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Knowledge-Intensive NLP Tasks
further_reading.why_relevant: Foundational RAG paper covering the retrieve-then-generate pattern that this module adapts to smaller local systems.

further_reading.title: Sentence-BERT: Sentence Embeddings using Siamese BERT-Networks
further_reading.why_relevant: Useful background for the embedding-based semantic search choices discussed in the module.

further_reading.title: Faiss
further_reading.why_relevant: Practical upstream reference for lightweight local dense-vector indexing, which fits the module's home-scale design focus.

notes: No inline citation seeds were emitted. The module is almost entirely pedagogical design guidance, heuristics, and scenario framing rather than discrete verifiable claims about incidents, standards, statistics, vendor/version behavior, or dated pricing.
